item.title: 成本控制 RAG：多租户 LLM 系统中检索和生成的统一每租户成本归因
item.summary: arXiv:2607.12188v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Enterprise Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) deployments face a critical governance gap: while LLM generation cost is metered per token, the retrieval layer - vector memory, similarity compute, and embedding API calls - remains an unattributed shared cost, enabling inv
